title: Identity kit
content:
Identity kit

Yes means no
No means anal

The culture of life vs the right to die

Sexuality omni

Our generation valued something more than money

What is our future oil? Water

--Released / published through ever growing active animated faux advertised social media website
----stark solid colors and occasional varied geometric confusions against differing fonts
----narrated by ever changing voices (I will use people within my program), by the ever changing "I," with the humming presence, fading in and out, of the constant unfurling white noise computer narration bubbling underneath
----scored with an ambient score (a universal source, perhaps coding that makes generative music so it never ends, loops, or repeats)
--Buy access to fully interactive and downloadable website along with personalized itemized limited editioned artwork / letters / photocopied journals & first drafts
--promise of constant output in return for support as an artist
